results.name: density-ceiling-chain
results.description: coherenceMonitor.BIAS_CEILING * negotiation.playScale_max must not exceed 2.5 (prevents audible note-cramming)

results.name: trust-weight-symmetry
results.description: adaptiveTrustScores weight clamp must match negotiation playScale clamp (trust cannot push outside negotiation range)

results.name: entropy-headroom
results.description: entropyRegulator scale clamp range must not allow effective multiplier > 3.0 when combined with negotiation entropy modulator

results.name: coherence-smoothing-stability
results.description: coherenceMonitor SMOOTHING must be >= 0.4 to prevent visible density oscillation

results.name: bias-ceiling-below-play-scale
results.description: coherenceMonitor BIAS_CEILING must be < negotiation playScale max to prevent density runaway

results.name: trust-ceiling-weight-coherence
results.description: TRUST_CEILING * weight_multiplier + 1 must not exceed trust_weight_max (trust ceiling must produce valid weight)

results.name: profile-streak-timing
results.description: profileAdaptation STREAK_TRIGGER must be >= 4 to prevent false positives from momentary lulls

results.name: ema-rate-consistency
results.description: Trust EMA decay + new-data rate must sum to 1.0

results.name: stutter-scale-wider-than-play
results.description: Negotiation stutter scale range must be wider than play scale range (stutter is more exploratory)

results.name: coupling-gain-headroom
results.description: pipelineCouplingManager GAIN_MAX must not exceed 1.0 (would overcorrect)
